prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: SON-GKIT2020-7PC-PARENT-IH
Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING
Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor
Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Classic Field Gold Panning Kit with Dual Riffle Pans 7pc (2 Colors)
Description: Get ready to mine for gold on your next gold panning adventure with the ASR Outdoor 7-Piece Classic Field Gold Panning Kit featuring two dual riffle pans, two metal magnifying tweezers with x4 magnification and three glass gold or gem storage vials. This starter gold panning kit features basic gold mining components for gold recovery and gold storage and is suitable for beginners or seasoned gold prospectors alike.
Search Terms: gold panning recovery prospecting outdoor kit supplies equipment for beginners mining sluice tools pan geology gem stone collecting
Features:
- GOLD RUSH READY: Get ready to mine for gold on your next gold panning adventure with the ASR Outdoor 7-Piece Classic Field Gold Panning Kit featuring two green dual riffle pans, two magnifying tweezers with x4 magnification and three glass vials; this starter gold panning kit features basic gold mining components for gold recovery and gold storage and is suitable for beginners or seasoned gold prospectors alike
- DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS: The standout component of this classic gold panning kit are the two green dual riffle gold pans; with both shallow and deep riffles, a wide textured bottom for material deposit separation and deep green color to highlight even fine gold, the riffled traps work to catch precious metals as the lighter material flows out of the pan, effectively and efficiently increasing your gold recovery efforts
- COMPACT AND PORTABLE: This ASR Outdoor classic field gold panning kit is compact and lightweight, easily fitting into any backpack or bag with your other gold prospecting equipment and tools; pack it with you for family day trips, camping adventures, beach days, gold prospecting excursions and more
- GOLD MINING EQUIPMENT: All the equipment in this gold panning kit is made from high quality materials that will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come and will stand up to lots of wear and tear
- SPECIFICATIONS: Kit includes: two (2) green dual riffle gold pans, two (2) magnifying tweezers, three (3) glass vials; Dimensions: 12 inch gold pan, 3.75 inch tweezers, 2.75 inch glass vials; Weight: .85lbs

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 7-Piece Gold Panning Kit with Dual Riffle Pans

tokens.name: Gold Panning Kit with Dual Riffle Pans

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 7-Pc 12" Green Gold Panning Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: Two Dual Riffle Pans, Magnifying Tweezers, Glass Storage Vials, Beginner To Pro Prospectors

openai.title_differentiation: Dual Riffle Pans, X4 Magnifying Tweezers, 3 Glass Vials, Beginner Prospecting, Portable Gold Recovery Kit
